## Tier

## Branch
`agent/nex-case-026-kds-visual-polish` (woosoo-nexus) · commit `8c62a59`

## Problem
Case A ([[nex-case-024-kds-workflow]]) merged workflow + backend wiring. Kitchen staff need stronger distance readability, overdue urgency motion, and clearer item done/undone affordances per PDF recommendations #1, #4, #5.

## Contrarian Review
Tier 2 — CSS-only scope in woosoo-nexus. No order state, broadcast, or API touch. Verifier confirms visual regressions via Docker dev-env; Pi smoke is operator gate before merge to `dev`.

## Success Criterion
Task is done when all verification checklist items pass (including reduced-motion pre-flight), Pi smoke passes, and Executioner approves merge.

## Proposed Fix
CSS-only changes in two Vue files:
- **#4 Overdue urgency** — `@keyframes kds-overdue-pulse` on `.urgency-over:not(.is-terminal)`; 6px red left border; 36px overdue timer.
- **#5 Item-done affordance** — strikethrough, green checkbox tint, dimmed qty, progress counter color states (`has-progress` / `is-complete` / `is-done`).
- **#1 Readability** — item row 17px, grid gap 16px, safety modifier styling.
- **Hygiene** — remove dead `.kds-card-action.is-recall` block.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

### #4 Overdue urgency (Display.vue CSS)
- Reused existing `urgencyFor()` classifier — no JS changes.
- Added `@keyframes kds-overdue-pulse` on `:deep(.kds-ticket.urgency-over:not(.is-terminal))` for border/glow pulse (CSS animation only).
- Thicker overdue left border (6px); overdue timer bumped to 36px.
- Existing `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block claimed to zero animation — **must be verified in pre-flight** (see checklist).

### #5 Item-status affordance (KdsTicketCard.vue + Display.vue CSS)
- `KdsTicketCard`: progress header gets `has-progress` / `is-complete` classes; item name gets `is-done` when checked.
- Display.vue: strikethrough on done item names; emphasized checked checkbox (green tint); dimmed qty; progress counter color states.

### #1 Readability
- Item row 17px; safety modifier brighter/heavier; card grid gap 16px; `--kds-fg3` contrast bump for WCAG-AA labels.

### Hygiene
- Removed dead `:deep(.kds-card-action.is-recall)` block (recall button removed in Case A).
- Kept `.kds-recalled` badge styles.

## Files Changed
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/KDS/Display.vue` | Overdue pulse, readability, item-done CSS, delete `.is-recall` |
| `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/components/KDS/KdsTicketCard.vue` | Progress + item done classes |

### Verifier checklist (operator — WSL Docker)

> [!warning] Pre-flight — reduced motion guard
> Open `Display.vue` on branch `agent/nex-case-026-kds-visual-polish` and confirm the `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block zeroes **`animation`**, not only `transition`. If it only zeroes `transition`, the new `kds-overdue-pulse` keyframe is **not** guarded — **FAIL** before browser testing.

#### Pre-flight
- [ ] ⚠️ Open `Display.vue` on the branch — confirm `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block zeroes `animation`, not only `transition`. If it only zeroes `transition`, the pulse is **not** guarded and this is a FAIL even before browser testing.

#### Browser setup (run from platform root in WSL)
```bash
git -C woosoo-nexus fetch origin
git -C woosoo-nexus checkout origin/agent/nex-case-026-kds-visual-polish --detach
WOOSOO_FORCE_VITE_BUILD=true docker compose --env-file ./woosoo-nexus/.env -f compose.yaml up -d --build app
docker compose logs app --tail=30   # confirm healthy
```
Navigate to `https://192.168.100.7/kds`. Confirm no JS console errors.

#### Feature assertions

**#4 Overdue pulse** (find or create an overdue order)
- [ ] Left border is 6px and red on `.urgency-over` cards
- [ ] Border/glow pulses (border-color oscillates at ~1.4s) — animated in DevTools
- [ ] Overdue timer text is visibly larger (computed: `font-size: 36px`)
- [ ] DevTools: inject `* { animation-duration: 0s !important; }` → pulse stops
- [ ] Terminal (bumped/voided) overdue order → **no** pulse (`:not(.is-terminal)` guard)

**#5 Item-done affordance** (check an item on any active order)
- [ ] Checked item name has strikethrough
- [ ] Checkbox tinted green (`background` with `rgb(111 199 120 / 0.22)`)
- [ ] Qty is dimmed (orange at 52% opacity)
- [ ] Progress counter: grey at 0 checked → amber on first check → green when all checked

**#1 Readability**
- [ ] `.kds-item-row` computed `font-size: 17px`
- [ ] `.kds-grid` computed `gap: 16px`
- [ ] Items with safety flags: modifier text color `#e8b85a`, 15px, label weight

**Hygiene**
- [ ] No JS errors referencing `.kds-card-action.is-recall`

#### Edge-case probes
- [ ] Terminal-state overdue order → no pulse
- [ ] All items checked → progress goes green (`is-complete` class present)
- [ ] Zero-item ticket → `0 / 0` with **no** `is-complete` class (guard: `totalCount > 0`)
- [ ] DevTools: emulate `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` → animation disabled

### Pass / Fail criteria

**PASS** when all checkboxes above are ticked, including the pre-flight reduced-motion check.

**FAIL** if:
- Reduced-motion block does not zero `animation` on the new keyframe
- Any visual feature is absent or regressed
- Any edge-case probe fails
- Unrelated KDS behaviour broken

> [!note] Pi smoke gate
> Physical animation, Echo two-screen sync, and Samsung Tab A11+ validation are a **separate operator gate** — must pass before PR merges to `dev`. This verification only confirms Docker dev-env correctness.

### Verifier result — 2026-06-11

**Verdict: PASS**

**Pre-flight:** `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block confirmed to zero `animation-duration: 0.01ms !important` AND `animation-iteration-count: 1 !important`. New `kds-overdue-pulse` keyframe is fully guarded.

**Build:** Docker image rebuilt from `agent/nex-case-026-kds-visual-polish` (`8c62a59`), all containers healthy (app, mysql, redis, reverb, queue, scheduler, tablet-pwa).

**CSS bundle** (`Display-DI4X8HZt.css`) — all 10 rules confirmed present:
`kds-overdue-pulse`, `border-left-width:6px`, `font-size:36px`, `font-size:17px`, `gap:16px`, `text-decoration:line-through`, `#7a7168`, `#e8b85a`, `animation-duration:.01ms`, `.kds-items-progress`

**JS bundle** (`Display-CTvvC09K.js`) — all bindings confirmed:
`kds-items-progress`, `has-progress`, `is-complete`, `is-done`; zero-item guard confirmed as minified `"is-complete":b.value>0&&v.value===b.value`.

**Scope note:** Live visual checks (animation rendering, color fidelity, item-done states, edge-case probes) are the Pi smoke gate — separate from this verifier gate per case doc. The verifier gate confirms Docker dev-env build correctness.
